title: Shareholders Approve Reclassification of Shreyas Shibulal and Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal to Public Category
detailed_summary: Infosys shareholders approved the reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from the category of 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public' at the 45th Annual General Meeting held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026. The applicants stand reclassified with immediate effect.

key_facts.fact: Shareholders approved the reclassification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal from 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public'.
The approval was given at the 45th Annual General Meeting held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026.
The Applicants stand reclassified to 'Public' category with immediate effect.

corporate_actions.description: Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal were reclassified from 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public'.

important_text_spans.text: the shareholders of the Company, in the 45 th Annual General Meeting held on Tuesday, June 23, 2026, have approved the proposal of re-classification of Mr. Shreyas Shibulal and Ms. Bhairavi Madhusudhan Shibulal ('the Applicants') from the category of 'Promoter and Promoter Group' to 'Public'.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the shareholder approval and identities of the reclassified persons.

important_text_spans.text: the Applicants stand reclassified to 'Public' category with immediate effect.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the effective status of the reclassification.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document reports a procedural shareholder approval for promoter-group reclassification without shareholding amounts, financial impact, business impact, or strategic change.
